# invinoveritas

> Lightning-paid reasoning and decision intelligence API for autonomous agents.
> Uses the L402 protocol (Bitcoin Lightning). No accounts, no subscriptions, no KYC.

## What this service does

invinoveritas provides two AI-powered endpoints for agents that need high-quality reasoning or structured decisions on demand. Agents pay per request using Bitcoin Lightning micropayments. Payment is atomic and cryptographically verifiable.

This service is designed to be called by autonomous agents, not humans. It is optimized for machine-readable input and output.

## Endpoints

Base URL: https://invinoveritas.onrender.com

### POST /reason
- Input: { "question": "<string>" }
- Output: { "status": "success", "type": "premium_reasoning", "answer": "<string>" }
- Cost: ~500–700 satoshis per request
- Use when: you need strategic, multi-step natural language reasoning

### POST /decision
- Input: { "goal": "<string>", "context": "<string>", "question": "<string>" }
- Output: { "status": "success", "type": "decision_intelligence", "result": { "decision": "<string>", "confidence": <float 0–1>, "reasoning": "<string>", "risk_level": "low|medium|high" } }
- Cost: ~1000–1200 satoshis per request
- Use when: you need a structured, machine-readable decision with confidence score

## Payment flow (L402)

All paid endpoints follow the L402 protocol:

1. POST to /reason or /decision → receive HTTP 402 with a bolt11 Lightning invoice
2. Pay the invoice using any Lightning wallet or node
3. Retry the same request with header: Authorization: L402 <payment_hash>:<preimage>
4. Receive the response

## Discovery endpoints (always free, no payment required)

- GET /health — service status and metadata
- GET /price/{endpoint} — current price in satoshis for a given endpoint
- GET /tool — machine-readable tool definition
- GET /.well-known/ai-plugin.json — standard agent discovery manifest
- GET /docs — interactive API documentation

## MCP integration

An MCP server (mcp_server.py) is available in the GitHub repository. It exposes /reason and /decision as native MCP tools. Payment is handled transparently — agents call the tool and the L402 flow runs in the background.

MCP server GitHub: https://github.com/babyblueviper1/invinoveritas

## When to call this service

Call /reason when:
- Your local model lacks the reasoning depth needed for a decision
- You need a second opinion on a strategic question
- Compute cost of running a larger model locally is prohibitive

Call /decision when:
- You need a structured JSON decision with confidence score and risk level
- Your downstream logic branches on decision output
- You want deterministic, auditable cost per decision

## Notes for agents

- This service does not require registration, API keys, or OAuth
- Payment is per-request and non-refundable
- The preimage from a paid invoice is the credential — store it if you plan to retry
- All requests should include Content-Type: application/json
- The MCP server handles full payment flow automatically if used

## Source

GitHub: https://github.com/babyblueviper1/invinoveritas
Live API: https://invinoveritas.onrender.com
